violations.text: Several blocks of cheese (32 LB) and butter (16 oz) was observed held at 47 degrees Fahrenheit. Ambient of refrigeration was 50 degrees Fahrenheit. PIC adjusted refrigeration dial from lowest setting to highest setting at time of inspection. Corrected temp. 41 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC voluntarily disposed of food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/09/2026
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine located in (kitchen). New Violation. Correct By: 03/09/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the (QT) sanitizing solution for the (3-bay sink). New Violation. Correct By: 03/09/2026

Milk and whipped cream were observed held at 46 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC voluntarily disposed of food at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of biofilm. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024

The following areas of the physical facilities were observed with an accumulation of old rodent droppings: 1) Floor in dry storage room 2) Floor in mop room 3) Floor near ware-washing 4) Floor throughout pantry room New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2024

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. The refrigerator was observed leaking onto the ground. Per PIC, condensate pan is in poor repair and does not evaporate condensate properly. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink (Expired 2018) New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2023
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2023
